overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a character exploring the interior of a medieval tavern called 'The Three Broomsticks'. The character walks through the main hall with a large fireplace, passes the bar area, and ascends multiple wooden staircases to reach upper floors and a dark corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hall of medieval tavern with high wooden beams

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main hall toward the large stone fireplace at the far end

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt sitting at bar counter on the right side

entered.detail: wooden tavern sign with text 'THE THREE BROOMSTICKS' mounted on ceiling beams
deer skull with antlers mounted on the central wooden beam
large stone fireplace with burning fire visible in the distance
exposed dark wooden ceiling beams and green painted ceiling panels
rustic wooden dining tables and benches along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Three Broomsticks tavern, walking through the main hall with high wooden ceilings and exposed beams. The space is warmly lit with a large stone fireplace visible in the distance, and a few patrons sit at tables along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: fireplace seating area with ornate woodwork

events.description: character turns slightly right to navigate around the fireplace seating area

agents.ego_description: walking past the ornate carved fireplace and along the wall covered with framed portraits

notable_agents.action: group of three people sitting at round table eating and drinking near the fireplace

entered.detail: elaborately carved wooden fireplace mantel with decorative coat of arms
green wall covered with various framed portraits and paintings
neatly stacked piles of chopped firewood beside the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks past the large ornate fireplace with intricate wood carvings. The green walls are decorated with framed portraits, and groups of NPCs sit at round tables eating and drinking. The fireplace mantel features an elaborate coat of arms design.

scene_state.functional_zone: tavern bar area with bottle shelves

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden bar counter and climbing the main wooden staircase toward the upper floor

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the bar counter arranging bottles

entered.detail: long wooden bar with stools and shelves of bottles behind it
tall shelves filled with various bottles, barrels, and glassware
wooden staircase with carved railings and newel posts leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the bar area, passing the long wooden counter with bottle shelves and barrels. A bartender stands behind the counter. The character then begins ascending the main wooden staircase with carved railings, leaving the main hall below.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor landing with stained glass windows

events.description: character begins ascending the second staircase to the top floor

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper floor landing past stained glass windows and climbing the second staircase to the top level

notable_agents.action: person in dress sitting at table near the stained glass windows

entered.detail: tall arched windows with colorful diamond-patterned stained glass
wooden balustrade railing overlooking the main hall below
second set of wooden stairs leading to the top floor balcony

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the upper floor landing illuminated by colorful stained glass windows. The wooden railing overlooks the main tavern hall below. After walking past tables where patrons sit, the character begins ascending a second staircase toward the top floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: top floor corridor with wall sconces

agents.ego_description: walking along the top floor balcony and entering the darker corridor toward a wooden door

entered.detail: iron chandelier hanging down into the main hall from the ceiling
lit wall-mounted candle sconces providing warm light in the corridor
arched wooden door at the end of the dark corridor

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top floor, walking along a balcony overlooking the main hall with a hanging chandelier visible below. The character then enters a darker corridor illuminated by wall sconces, approaching an arched wooden door at the end of the hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the warm, bustling interior of a medieval tavern that gradually ascends into the quiet, dim corridors of its upper floors. It begins by entering the main hall under high wooden beams, moving past patrons at tables toward a large, ornate stone fireplace adorned with intricate carvings and a coat of arms. As the camera passes the long wooden bar and its shelves of bottles, the perspective shifts upward, ascending a carved wooden staircase that leaves the lively hall behind. The scene then opens onto an upper landing illuminated by colorful stained glass before climbing a second flight of stairs to a high balcony overlooking a hanging chandelier. Finally, the movement transitions from the open architecture into a darker, secluded corridor lit by wall sconces, leading toward an arched wooden door at the end of the hallway.
